title: Trying to delete a ›has-video‹ relationship with invalid RACE TRACK ID
gherkin:
Given "RACE TRACK" "Nürburgring" does NOT exist
And there exists a "VIDEO" "Promo Video"
When the user deletes the "has-video" relationship between "Nürburgring" and "Promo Video"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
